APPEARANCES: Atty. CAROLINE MCCORMICK, Tel No. (925) 628-4470 specially appearing for the Judgment Creditor Capital One Bank (USA), N.A.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judgment Debtor Makoto Onoda's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. (CCP sec. 706.051.) $100 per pay period may be garnished in order to satisfy the judgment. COURT TO PREPARE AND SERVE A FORMAL ORDER ON ALL PARTIES. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
